ground_truth.title: Sentiment Analysis of Financial News for Stock Return Prediction Using Large Language Models
ground_truth.abstract: We fine-tune FinBERT and GPT-based models on financial news corpora to predict next-day stock returns, analyzing whether LLM-derived sentiment factors generate alpha beyond traditional momentum signals.
